lost_token.title: Recover the Lost Token
lost_token.summary: Play Cabinet 07, then bring the Lost Token back to Mira.
lost_token.details: Mira says Cabinet 07 has the Lost Token. Recover it from Cabinet 07 on the ArcadeHub main floor, then return to Mira at the ticket counter.

truth_filter.title: Truth Filter
truth_filter.summary: Find Mr. Byte in Cabinet Row and open the Truth Filter.
truth_filter.details: The Lost Token woke something. Go to Cabinet Row, talk to Mr. Byte, and use the Truth Filter to sort the false records.

circuit_soda.title: Route the Signal
circuit_soda.summary: Help Vendo in Snack Alcove stabilize the memory signal.
circuit_soda.details: The Truth Filter recovered a second fragment, but the signal is still misrouted. Talk to Vendo in Snack Alcove, then use Circuit Soda.

maintenance_sync.title: Maintenance Sync
maintenance_sync.summary: Help Gus use Maintenance Sync in Maintenance Hall.
maintenance_sync.details: Service power is restored. Talk to Gus in Maintenance Hall, then use Maintenance Sync to line up the Staff Door signals.

lost_shift_file.title: Lost Shift File
lost_shift_file.summary: Read the Closing Checklist, Staff Schedule, and Maintenance Note.
lost_shift_file.details: The signal is routed, but the Staff Door still refuses to open. Read the Closing Checklist in ArcadeHub, the Staff Schedule in Cabinet Row, and Gus's Maintenance Note in Maintenance Hall.

static_service_run.title: Static Service Run
static_service_run.summary: Talk to Gus in Maintenance Hall and restore service power.
static_service_run.details: The Lost Shift File gave Gus enough context to work with the Staff Door, but Maintenance Hall still needs service power. Talk to Gus, then run Static Service Run.

staff_corridor.title: Enter the Staff Corridor
staff_corridor.summary: Use the Staff Corridor exit past Maintenance Hall.
staff_corridor.details: Gus stabilized the Staff Door. Use the Staff Corridor exit so the overloaded signal can lead toward Security Tape, Final Night Walk, and Memory Echo.

security_tape_assembly.title: Assemble the Security Tape
security_tape_assembly.summary: Use the Security Tape terminal in Staff Corridor.
security_tape_assembly.details: The Staff Door recorded two signals, but the tape is damaged. Assemble the Security Tape in Staff Corridor before Final Night Walk and Memory Echo.

final_night_walk.title: Final Night Walk
final_night_walk.summary: Use Final Night Walk in Staff Corridor.
final_night_walk.details: The security tape is assembled, but the memory is still too unstable to play back. Use Final Night Walk in Staff Corridor before confronting the Memory Echo.

memory_echo.title: Stabilize the Memory Echo
memory_echo.summary: Use Memory Echo in Staff Corridor.
memory_echo.details: The Final Night route is stable. Use Memory Echo in Staff Corridor to stabilize the signal before the Staff Room reveals what happened.

broken_high_score.title: Broken High Score
broken_high_score.details: The score claims the target is 9999, but the display is broken. The real record may be much smaller and much stranger.

prize_counter_secret.title: Prize Sort
prize_counter_secret.summary: Arrange three prize labels by memory state.
prize_counter_secret.details: Pip says the prize labels remember an order: Ticket Stub, Lost Token, then Blank Employee Badge.

staff_records_chain.title: Staff Records Chain
staff_records_chain.location: Cabinet Row, Maintenance Hall, Staff Corridor
staff_records_chain.summary: Read three optional staff records after the Truth Filter.
staff_records_chain.details: The arcade preserved small system notes around the Final Night. They deepen the identity mystery without blocking the required route.

post_reveal_witness_route.title: Post-Reveal Witness Route
post_reveal_witness_route.owner: Mira / Gus / Vendo / Mr. Byte / Cabinet 07
post_reveal_witness_route.location: ArcadeHub, Cabinet Row, Maintenance Hall, Snack Alcove
post_reveal_witness_route.summary: Speak with the core witnesses after the reveal.
post_reveal_witness_route.details: Pixel Haven remembers the protagonist in pieces. Roxy and Pip can add optional reflections if the player met them.
